description_long: This is a classic baseball bat with a natural wood-colored barrel and a contrasting black handle. The handle features a textured grip area, likely made of rubber or synthetic material, which provides a secure hold for the user. Two dark rings encircle the transition between the barrel and the handle, adding a subtle decorative touch. The bat tapers smoothly from the thick barrel to the thinner handle, ending in a rounded knob at the base. The surface appears smooth and well-finished, with no visible logos, text, or additional markings. The end cap is subtly rounded and matches the color of the handle, giving the bat a cohesive and professional appearance.
description: A natural wood-colored baseball bat with a black, textured handle and two dark rings near the barrel. The surface is smooth and unmarked, with a rounded end cap matching the handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the wood barrel, black handle, and two dark rings at the transition.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, showing the circular cross-section and the transition to the black handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the smooth wood barrel and black handle with clear separation.
description_view_3: End-on view of the handle, showing the rounded knob and the grip texture wrapping around the handle.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The grip area is black with a subtle, evenly spaced ringed texture, likely rubber or synthetic, wrapped in a standard spiral style. No visible designs or logos.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, black, and appears to be made of the same material as the handle, with a smooth texture and no visible logos or markings.
